case_title: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O VS TUSCHER,TERRENCE BOYD R/O

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O AS TO DEFENDANT TUSCHER,TERRENCE BOYD  R/O ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,320.00 FILED BY TUSCHER,TERRENCE BOYD  R/O AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TUSCHER,TERRENCE BOYD  R/O

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUSCHER,TERRENCE BOYD  R/O $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAILING TO AUTHORIZED AGENT OF PROCESS.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TUSCHER,TERRENCE BOYD  R/O

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TUSCHER,TERRENCE BOYD  R/O IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
